NAVAREA XIX 48/18
BARENTS SEA
SEISMIC SURVEY IN PROGRESS 17 MAY TO FURTHER NOTICE BY VESSEL RAMFORM ATLAS C6AX2 
TOWING 16 STREAMERS 6 NM IN LENGTH WITHIN AREA BOUNDED BY:
A.72-05.3N 021-02.3E
B.72-05.4N 022-02.2E
C.72-23.0N 022-27.4E
D.72-21.5N 024-46.3E
E.71-09.1N 022-52.2E
F.70-52.2N 021-33.0E
G.70-32.5N 019-01.2E
H.72-05.3N 021-02.3E
GUARD VESSELS IN ATTENDANCE: M/V THOR OMEGA, THOR FREYJA AND M/V BRAVO SAPPHIRE
WIDE BERTH REQUESTED
